description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a predominantly white exterior and clean, geometric lines. The structure features large, floor-to-ceiling windows on the front facade, allowing for ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. A swing set and outdoor seating area are positioned adjacent to the main building, suggesting a family-friendly environment. The roof is flat, and the house includes a mix of open and enclosed spaces, with visible interior furnishings such as shelving and kitchen fixtures. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with a prominent glass section on the front and smaller windows on the sides. The main entryway is defined by a sleek, glass-paneled door and a minimalistic approach, lacking ornate details or a porch.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large front windows, and a white exterior, accompanied by a swing set and outdoor seating. The design is clean and contemporary, with asymmetrical window placement and minimalistic entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing large floor-to-ceiling windows, the main entry door, and an adjacent swing set and outdoor seating.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the flat roof, back wall, and the swing set positioned to the left of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal window presence, a small window on the right, and a clear view of the house's angular back wall.
description_view_3: Side view showing the flat roof, a small window, and the swing set and seating area to the right.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalistic glass-paneled door with no porch or decorative elements, flush with the facade
